hooks.command: jq -c 'if (.tool_input.command // "" | test("git commit")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Commit landed. Note in 1-2 sentences what you verified (gates passed, behavior unchanged, anything risky). If something material is worth flagging — a behavior change, a deferred follow-up, a coverage gap — name it. Otherwise just confirm and move on. Skip headers, sections, and adjacent-code recaps. Run /review-step explicitly only if the commit is unusually risky."}} else empty end'
